test-case.description: returns empty array when Status is not Success
test-case.name: Normalize-KubeBench.returns empty array when Status is not Success

test-case.description: maps FAIL and WARN findings and ignores PASS
test-case.name: Normalize-KubeBench.maps FAIL and WARN findings and ignores PASS

test-case.description: maps rows to AKS AzureResource entity metadata
test-case.name: Normalize-KubeBench.maps rows to AKS AzureResource entity metadata

test-case.description: preserves severity mapping for FAIL/WARN findings
test-case.name: Normalize-KubeBench.preserves severity mapping for FAIL/WARN findings

test-case.description: attaches kube-bench ControlId values
test-case.name: Normalize-KubeBench.attaches kube-bench ControlId values

test-case.description: returns one of windows/macos/linux
test-case.name: Installer helpers.Get-CurrentOS.returns one of windows/macos/linux

test-case.description: returns true for a shell builtin like pwsh
test-case.name: Installer helpers.Test-CliAvailable.returns true for a shell builtin like pwsh

test-case.description: returns false for a bogus command
test-case.name: Installer helpers.Test-CliAvailable.returns false for a bogus command

test-case.description: returns true for Pester which is clearly installed
test-case.name: Installer helpers.Test-PSModuleAvailable.returns true for Pester which is clearly installed

test-case.description: returns false for a bogus module
test-case.name: Installer helpers.Test-PSModuleAvailable.returns false for a bogus module

test-case.description: returns a missing count without throwing when SkipInstall is set
test-case.name: Install-PrerequisitesFromManifest.returns a missing count without throwing when SkipInstall is set

test-case.description: honours ShouldRunTool filter (no action when all excluded)
test-case.name: Install-PrerequisitesFromManifest.honours ShouldRunTool filter (no action when all excluded)

test-case.description: treats install.kind=none tools as fully satisfied
test-case.name: Install-PrerequisitesFromManifest.treats install.kind=none tools as fully satisfied

test-case.description: flags missing CLI tools when SkipInstall is set
test-case.name: Install-PrerequisitesFromManifest.flags missing CLI tools when SkipInstall is set

test-case.description: skips disabled tools
test-case.name: Install-PrerequisitesFromManifest.skips disabled tools

test-case.description: every enabled tool has an install block
test-case.name: Manifest wiring.every enabled tool has an install block

test-case.description: every enabled tool has a report color and phase
test-case.name: Manifest wiring.every enabled tool has a report color and phase

test-case.description: cli install entries reference a probe command
test-case.name: Manifest wiring.cli install entries reference a probe command

test-case.description: gitclone install entries specify repo, target, and probe
test-case.name: Manifest wiring.gitclone install entries specify repo, target, and probe

test-case.description: driver script exists and parses
test-case.name: Update-ToolPins.ps1 / manifest upstream metadata.driver script exists and parses

test-case.description: every tool with an external upstream has an upstream block with required fields
test-case.name: Update-ToolPins.ps1 / manifest upstream metadata.every tool with an external upstream has an upstream block with required fields

test-case.description: custom in-repo tools do NOT declare upstream
test-case.name: Update-ToolPins.ps1 / manifest upstream metadata.custom in-repo tools do NOT declare upstream

test-case.description: weekly workflow is SHA-pinned and triggers on schedule + dispatch
test-case.name: Update-ToolPins.ps1 / manifest upstream metadata.weekly workflow is SHA-pinned and triggers on schedule + dispatch
